CustomField.description: Self-lookup that creates a dependency chain. When set, the generated Task starts in "Waiting on Parent Task" status and its due date is calculated relative to the parent Task's due date rather than the plan creation date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If set, this Task will not become active until the parent Task is completed, and its due date will be calculated from the parent's due date.
CustomField.label: Parent Task
